tasks.label: Anime Tone V3 Pipeline
args: .venv/bin/python scripts/refill_anime_hints_rule2_v1.py --apply && .venv/bin/python scripts/guard_hint_answer_overlap_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --max-print 200 && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_global_hint_rules_v1.py && .venv/bin/python scripts/audit_hint_quality_v29.py --input assets/puzzles.json --out-dir tmp/anime_tone_conan_dora_v3_audit --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_anime_guessability_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --category 动漫 --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --out-dir tmp/anime_tone_conan_dora_v3_guessability

tasks.label: Anime Tone V3 Snapshot
args: .venv/bin/python -c "import json;from pathlib import Path;from collections import Counter;arr=json.loads(Path('assets/puzzles.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'));anime=[x for x in arr if x.get('category')=='动漫'];slot1=Counter(x['hints'][0] for x in anime);slot34=Counter((x['hints'][2],x['hints'][3]) for x in anime);print('slot1_top',slot1.most_common(12));print('slot34_unique',len(slot34));targets=['名侦探柯南','哆啦A梦','海贼王','火影','进击的巨人','樱桃小丸子','鬼灭之刃','狐妖小红娘'];[print(a,' | '.join(next(x for x in anime if x.get('answer')==a)['hints'][:7])) for a in targets]"

tasks.label: Anime Reorder Dry Eval
args: .venv/bin/python scripts/reorder_anime_hints_only_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --out-dir tmp/anime_reorder_only_eval --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json && .venv/bin/python scripts/audit_hint_quality_v29.py --input tmp/anime_reorder_only_eval/puzzles.anime_reordered_only_v1.json --out-dir tmp/anime_reorder_only_eval_audit --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_anime_guessability_v1.py --input tmp/anime_reorder_only_eval/puzzles.anime_reordered_only_v1.json --category 动漫 --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --out-dir tmp/anime_reorder_only_eval_guess

tasks.label: Anime Tail Reorder Eval
args: .venv/bin/python tmp/eval_anime_tail_reorder.py && .venv/bin/python scripts/audit_hint_quality_v29.py --input tmp/anime_reorder_tail_eval/puzzles.anime_reordered_tail_v1.json --out-dir tmp/anime_reorder_tail_eval_audit --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_anime_guessability_v1.py --input tmp/anime_reorder_tail_eval/puzzles.anime_reordered_tail_v1.json --category 动漫 --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --out-dir tmp/anime_reorder_tail_eval_guess

tasks.label: Apply Anime Reorder Excluding Special
args: .venv/bin/python scripts/reorder_anime_hints_only_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --out-dir tmp/anime_reorder_excluding_special_apply --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json --policy-file data/final_hint_policy_v1.json --apply && .venv/bin/python scripts/guard_hint_answer_overlap_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --max-print 200 && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_global_hint_rules_v1.py && .venv/bin/python scripts/audit_hint_quality_v29.py --input assets/puzzles.json --out-dir tmp/anime_reorder_excluding_special_apply_audit --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_anime_guessability_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --category 动漫 --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --out-dir tmp/anime_reorder_excluding_special_apply_guess

tasks.label: Score Special Candidates
Apply Special Minimal Tweaks
args: .venv/bin/python scripts/refill_anime_hints_rule2_v1.py --apply && .venv/bin/python scripts/guard_hint_answer_overlap_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --max-print 200 && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_global_hint_rules_v1.py && .venv/bin/python scripts/audit_hint_quality_v29.py --input assets/puzzles.json --out-dir tmp/anime_special_tweak_audit --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_anime_guessability_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --category 动漫 --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --out-dir tmp/anime_special_tweak_guess && .venv/bin/python tmp/anime_tone_v3_snapshot.py

tasks.label: Reapply NonSpecial Reorder After Tweak
args: .venv/bin/python scripts/reorder_anime_hints_only_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --out-dir tmp/anime_final_after_special_tweak --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json --policy-file data/final_hint_policy_v1.json --apply && .venv/bin/python scripts/guard_hint_answer_overlap_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --max-print 200 && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_global_hint_rules_v1.py && .venv/bin/python scripts/audit_hint_quality_v29.py --input assets/puzzles.json --out-dir tmp/anime_final_after_special_tweak_audit --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --calib-path data/semantic_calibration_v27_semreal_anchor.json && .venv/bin/python scripts/validate_anime_guessability_v1.py --input assets/puzzles.json --category 动漫 --model-path models/bge-m3-finetuned-v27-semreal-anchor --out-dir tmp/anime_final_after_special_tweak_guess

tasks.label: Finalize No Meta Anime
